name: Sesame Chicken Strips
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chicken breast; skin and bone removed, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayo, onion, and mustard in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine the crushed crackers and sesame seeds.
3. Dip chicken strips into the mayo mixture, then into the seed mixture.
4. Place the strips in a single layer on a large greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 425°F for 15 to 18 minutes, or until juices run clear.
6. Combine sauce ingredients (mayo and honey) and serve with the chicken strips.
